task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'ChemCorp_LCA' database.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The openLCA navigation pane shows a database named 'ChemCorp_LCA' as active (typically bolded or expanded).

task_completion.description: Verify the category hierarchy for Elementary flows.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the navigation pane under 'Flows' -> 'Elementary flows', there is a folder named 'Air emissions' containing a subfolder 'Manufacturing', and a folder named 'Water emissions' containing a subfolder 'Process effluent'.

task_completion.description: Verify the category hierarchy for Product flows.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the navigation pane under 'Flows' -> 'Product flows', there is a folder named 'Intermediates' containing subfolders 'Catalysts' and 'Solvents'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the three air emission elementary flows.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the 'Manufacturing' folder under 'Elementary flows', the flows 'Catalyst residue X-47', 'Volatile organic compound mix A', and 'Sulfonate byproduct' are visible. If a flow editor is open, the reference flow property should be 'Mass' with unit 'kg'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the two water emission elementary flows.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the 'Process effluent' folder under 'Elementary flows', the flows 'Heavy metal sludge' and 'Thermal effluent' are visible. If a flow editor is open, the reference flow property should be 'Mass' with unit 'kg'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the three product flows.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the 'Catalysts' folder, 'Palladium catalyst intermediate' is visible. Inside the 'Solvents' folder, 'Reclaimed toluene solvent' and 'Ethyl acetate solvent grade B' are visible. If a flow editor is open, the reference flow property should be 'Mass' with unit 'kg'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the openLCA GUI to create the database and flows.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the openLCA application window with the navigation tree and flow editors, rather than a terminal window executing scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the application menus and dialogs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for openLCA dialog boxes (e.g., 'New flow', 'New category') or active tabs in the main editor area during the trajectory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a text editor to write a script that bypasses the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The progression of screenshots shows manual creation steps in the GUI (right-clicking folders, typing names in dialogs) rather than a text editor or IDE.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Database name: 'ChemCorp_LCA'. Expected Elementary flows (base names): 'Catalyst residue X-47', 'Volatile organic compound mix A', 'Sulfonate byproduct', 'Heavy metal sludge', 'Thermal effluent'. Expected Product flows: 'Palladium catalyst intermediate', 'Reclaimed toluene solvent', 'Ethyl acetate solvent grade B'. Expected leaf categories: 'Manufacturing', 'Process effluent', 'Catalysts', 'Solvents'. Note: OpenLCA separates flow names and flow types, so the ', to air' or ', to water' suffixes might be handled via flow type properties rather than the base name string.
